scripts.check: bunx biome check biome.json package.json shared/src shared/test shared/package.json shared/tsconfig.json web/src web/test web/package.json web/astro.config.mjs web/tsconfig.json tui/src tui/test tui/package.json tui/tsconfig.json && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @gitpulse/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @gitpulse/web typecheck && bun run --filter @gitpulse/tui typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter @gitpulse/shared test && bun run --filter @gitpulse/web test && bun run --filter @gitpulse/tui test
